'''Laspevar''' was the leader of the [[Taloraan/Legends|Taloraanian]] [[Denfrandi]] tribe during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was a wise man who preferred peaceful negotiations to violent solutions, and was much respected by his people.

He made contact with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], when he saved the lives of Rebel prospectors, whose [[Jackpot|space ship]] was just about to crash due to a severe atmospheric storm. He also subsequently helped them acquire a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] from the hostile [[Wind Raiders/Legends|Wind Raider]] tribe.

==Appearances==
